title: Add Codex epic runner and runner-neutral handoff protocol
description:
Generalize the shipped ticks skill so Claude Code and Codex can orchestrate the same epics. Add harness adapters, durable cross-runner handoff rules, and update project/snippet documentation to address both AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md.

Acceptance:
- Shared runner workflow is harness-neutral and links Claude and Codex adapters.
- Codex adapter uses supported local Codex CLI/worktree primitives.
- A run created by either harness can be resumed by the other using tick and git state only.
- go test ./... passes.
acceptance_criteria: go test ./... passes; runner docs contain no Claude-only execution claim
closed_reason: Completed: added runner-neutral orchestration, Claude and Codex adapters, effort-aware model policy, and durable cross-runner recovery
